overview: Center for Insight Medicine uses a neuroscience-based approach to diagnose and treat chronic pain, medically unexplained symptoms, and functional somatic disorders. The clinic emphasizes comprehensive history-taking and physical examination to identify root causes, distinguishing between structural/pathological conditions and neuroplastic factors.
targetAudience: Patients with chronic pain, functional syndromes, or medically unexplained symptoms whose conditions have not improved with conventional medical approaches.
